start.line: Good evening, sir. The house pour is a martini. The house policy is discretion.

options.text: Tell me about the Baron's funicular.
The large gentleman by the cliff — what moves him?

shaken.line: Sir, this is the Hôtel Bombe. Everything here is shaken. Mostly by the Baron's funicular.

funicular.line: Private line, up to the Baron's... tea room. Guests by invitation. The invitation is Mr. Fondant, and he never extends it.

options.text: And what does Mr. Fondant care about?

charm.line: Many have tried, sir. The cliff below is littered with charm.

fondant.line: One thing only, sir. Proper shortbread. Real butter, mind — he weeps at the real thing, and he can taste a margarine lie through the wrapper.
